arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs RB Salzburg: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Salzburg in the Champions League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: See it to believe it: Barcelona copy Real Madrid in sensational style
arts.sum: Barcelona became the second team to advance to the Champions League Round of 16 after winning a wild match against Benfica, where they had to come back from 3-1 and 4-2 deficits to ultimately win 5-4 in stoppage time, in a fashion reminiscent of Real Madrid. But things could still get worse: five minutes later, with Barcelona in disarray, Szczesny charged like a bull at a Portuguese forward and conceded a penalty that, while debatable on review, was clear in real-time.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Salzburg - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting Real Madrid's starting XI for their Champions League clash with Salzburg on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Most fans missed it: Haaland drops hidden comment that leaves door open to future Real Madrid move
arts.sum: As I said, I am very happy with my choice and hope to spend many more years in Manchester. Ultimately, when I spoke with people, we came to this conclusion, and I felt very good about it”, Haaland expressed when asked why City was the ideal destination to continue his career, “ I look forward to spending many more years in Manchester.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reveals dream Real Madrid exit plan but admits it's not up to him
arts.sum: There have been reports that Carlo Ancelotti could leave Real Madrid this summer, but the Italian poured cold water on those rumours and insisted he would be happy to stay at the Bernabeu for another four years

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Why Real Madrid Have Had So Many ACL Injuries
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Vik Sobti discuss: Kiyan Sobhani is joined by radiologist Vik Sobti

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Real Madrid and Red Bull Salzburg.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid trio one yellow card away from suspension ahead of RB Salzburg clash
arts.sum: Three members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid will be forced to walk the disciplinary tightrope in the club’s meeting with RB Salzburg. Real, of course,…

arts.ttl: Where to Watch Real Madrid vs RB Salzburg for UEFA Champions League Game
arts.sum: Real Madrid resume their UCL campaign on Wednesday when they host Austrian side RB Salzburg.

arts.ttl: Arsenal beat both Real Madrid and Barcelona in Champions League battle
arts.sum: What is most surprising is that Arsenal, currently second in the Premier League but six points behind Liverpool (with one game in hand), is ranked above Flick’s Barcelona and Ancelotti’s Real Madrid . Arsenal favoured in Champions League over Madrid and Barça
